meta.homeTitle: Playa Venao Adventures | Pacific Coast Escape in Panama
meta.homeDescription: A hidden gem in Central America. Wild nature, open ocean, mountains and waterfalls — all in one place.

footer.tagline: Playa Venao, Panama — an experience, not just a destination
footer.copyright: © 2026 Playa Venao Adventures. All rights reserved.

hero.title: Playa Venao, Panama — Your Perfect Escape on the Pacific Coast
hero.subtitle: A hidden gem in Central America. Wild nature, open ocean, mountains and waterfalls — all in one place.

vibe.title: The Vibe
vibe.text: Calm days, social nights. The perfect balance between quiet and connection. Slow mornings, sea air and nature. Evenings with people, music and good energy. Come solo, as a couple, or with your best friends — either way you'll never feel alone. It's easy to meet new people, and the overall feeling is less 'tourist' and more like joining a different way of life. Barefoot walks, laptops by the sea, sunset surf sessions and evenings together at beach bars.

local.title: Local Knowledge
local.body: We know Playa Venao, Panama up close — local knowledge that makes all the difference.

care.title: We Handle Everything
care.body: We take care of everything for you, from logistics to the smallest details.

personal.title: Personalized
personal.body: A trip tailored exactly to you. Solo, as a couple, or as a family — we customize everything. You focus on the experience; we handle the rest.

about.title: About Us
about.intro: Playa Venao Adventures — your team for an authentic Panama vacation. We connect people, nature and experiences — without feeling like tourists.
about.body: Playa Venao is more than a surf destination. It's an international community, a boho-chic beach vibe, and a lifestyle that blends work, adventure and rest. We're here to plan, book and care for everything — so you can simply be.

lodging.title: Lodging Options
lodging.intro: Comfortable, pleasant places — all within walking distance of the beach. Travel your way, feel right at home.

hostels.title: Social Hostels
hostels.body: Ideal for solo travelers, surfers and those seeking a young, social atmosphere. Most are very close to the beach with shared lounges, pools, bars and weekly social events.

boutique.title: Beach Boutique Hotels
boutique.body: Perfect for couples and those seeking a calmer, design-forward stay. Private rooms, pools, restaurants and ocean views.

apartments.title: Apartments & Guest Complexes
apartments.body: Great for friend groups, families and longer stays. Includes kitchen, living room and workspaces for independent living.

villas.title: Private Jungle & Mountain Villas
villas.body: Quiet natural settings offering full privacy, open ocean views, sunsets, private pools and direct connection to tropical nature.

resorts.title: Resorts & Premium Experience
resorts.body: Full hospitality with pools, restaurants, spa areas, yoga spaces and direct beach access — everything in one place.

culinary.title: Culinary Destination
culinary.intro: Good food, great energy. Culinary abundance and good vibes all day long. Eat well, feel better, enjoy every moment.

yasu.name: Yasu
yasu.description: Modern Greek flavors on the waterfront. Fresh meals, tropical atmosphere, clean and vibrant.

sol.name: Sol
sol.description: Fresh bowls and tropical vibes. Light, colorful and full of energy.

coleos.name: Coleos
coleos.description: Middle Eastern with Asian touches. Comfort food exactly as it should be.

michaela.name: Michaela
michaela.description: Local flavors with a homestyle touch. Simple, fresh and full of taste.

surfPage.title: Surfing in Playa Venao
surfPage.intro: Playa Venao is one of Central America's most renowned and consistent surf destinations, with waves that work year-round for beginners and advanced surfers alike.

yearRound.title: Year-Round Waves
yearRound.body: A consistent point break with reliable swells — great conditions in every season, perfect for flexible trip planning.

allLevels.title: All Skill Levels
allLevels.body: Beginners learn on mellow, protected waves; advanced surfers enjoy stronger sections — everyone gets their wave.

schools.title: Schools & Camps
schools.body: Surf schools, surf camps (like SHOKOGI SURF SCHOOL), board rentals, private and group lessons.

community.title: Surf Community
community.body: A strong international community — sunset sessions, social beach vibes, and real connections with people from around the world.

surf.title: Surfing
surf.body: Playa Venao is one of Central America's most renowned and consistent surf destinations, with waves year-round for beginners and advanced surfers. Surf schools, camps (like SHOKOGI SURF SCHOOL), board rentals and a strong community.

nightlife.title: Nightlife
nightlife.body: Beach parties, pool parties, live shows, DJ nights and sunset parties in a free, international vibe.

waterfalls.title: Waterfall Tours
waterfalls.body: Hidden spots in Panama's jungles — refresh in natural, cool pools.

fishing.title: Fishing Trips
fishing.body: Head out to sea for a true local adventure (Tuna, Mahi Mahi, Snapper, Roosterfish) — relax and enjoy the ocean.

iguana.title: Isla Iguana
iguana.body: Crystal turquoise waters beside white sand. The perfect spot for snorkeling and relaxation.

horses.title: Horseback Riding
horses.body: Ride through wild nature with open panoramic views.

basic.title: Basic Vacation Package
basic.body: Includes lodging, trip planning and personalized transport options. Attractions booked separately based on weather.

full.title: Vacation Package with Attractions
full.body: Includes lodging and a variety of attractions and tours throughout your stay.

corporate.title: Corporate Events & Private Groups
corporate.body: Custom company retreats combining workspaces, group lodging, private meals, team activities, beach parties and wellness workshops.

eventsPage.title: Private & Corporate Event Production in Panama
eventsPage.whyTitle: Why produce your event with us?
eventsPage.whyBody: Producing an event far from home in a foreign country requires real local knowledge — language, culture, logistics, transport, and the right vendors and lodging. For most people, managing this remotely is nearly impossible. That's why we're here. We live in Panama, know every corner, speak the language, and work with the most trusted local suppliers. We guide you hand in hand from early planning back home until the last guest boards their flight. Our goal is to bring everything under one roof so you arrive with peace of mind — no headaches, no small details to chase — knowing someone local is making sure everything runs smoothly and professionally.

services.planning: Concept planning and a custom schedule
services.lodging: Diverse lodging solutions for every guest type
services.culinary: Culinary experiences, restaurants, catering and private meals
services.vendors: Local vendors (design, sound, photography, music and more)
services.management: Full logistics management and on-site support throughout your stay

eventsPage.retreatsIntro: Playa Venao is one of Panama's leading locations for groups seeking real disconnection, personal connection and meaningful depth. We design and produce retreats from scratch — from concept through logistics, lodging, content and activities.
eventsPage.cta: Talk to us about your event

weddings.title: Weddings in Playa Venao
weddings.excerpt: An intimate, unforgettable tropical wedding at sunset — that becomes a multi-day vacation for all your guests.

privateParties.title: Birthdays & Private Celebrations
privateParties.excerpt: From a few-hour party to a full tropical experience — private villas, boat trips, beach parties and chef dinners by the sea.

corporate.title: Corporate Events & Team Retreats
corporate.excerpt: A unique company getaway blending work, nature, activities and real human connection — intimate team days to productions for hundreds.

honeymoon.title: Honeymoon & Romantic Getaways
honeymoon.excerpt: A different kind of romantic escape — wild nature, ocean, stunning sunsets and experiences tailored for couples.

wellness.title: Wellness & Balance Retreats
wellness.excerpt: Yoga, meditation, healthy nutrition and treatments — slow down and step away from daily stress.

surf.title: Surf & Lifestyle Retreats
surf.excerpt: Surf lessons, video analysis, surf yoga and vibrant beach life — for beginners and advanced surfers.

weddings.title: Weddings in Playa Venao
weddings.intro: The perfect setting for an intimate, unforgettable tropical wedding at sunset.
weddings.body: Your wedding doesn't end after one evening — it becomes a multi-day vacation for all your guests, filled with sea, parties, nature and shared experiences in Panama. We produce intimate beach weddings, luxury villa events, and large productions for hundreds of guests.

includes.lodging: Lodging and airport transfers for all guests
includes.activities: Attractions and activities before and after the wedding

privateParties.title: Birthdays & Private Celebrations
privateParties.intro: The perfect space for fully customized events that turn a celebration into an ongoing tropical experience.
privateParties.body: Whether it's an intimate couple's birthday, a wild friends' party, or a special family celebration — Playa Venao offers fully tailored events.

includes.sunsetParties: Sunset and beach parties with DJ
includes.privateDining: Private restaurants and chef dinners by the sea

corporate.title: Corporate Events & Team Retreats
corporate.intro: A unique company retreat blending work, nature, activities and genuine human connection.
corporate.body: Looking to take your team somewhere completely different? Instead of another generic city hotel or conference, Playa Venao offers a unique company experience. We produce everything from intimate team days to complex logistics for dozens or hundreds of participants.

honeymoon.title: Honeymoon & Romantic Getaways
honeymoon.intro: A different kind of romantic vacation — wild nature, ocean, stunning sunsets and complete privacy.
honeymoon.body: Playa Venao offers couples a romantic escape like no other. Our goal isn't just to book a hotel — it's to craft a complete, precise experience around the atmosphere you're looking for.

includes.custom: Private experiences built just for you

wellness.title: Wellness & Balance Retreats
wellness.intro: Retreats focused on health, body-mind balance and healthy living — slow down and leave stress behind.
wellness.body: Retreats for companies, instructors, influencers, communities and private groups. We build and produce retreats from scratch — from concept through logistics, lodging, content and activities.

includes.yoga: Yoga, body movement, meditation and breathwork

surf.title: Surf & Lifestyle Retreats
surf.intro: A professional, social retreat focused on surfing and the lifestyle around it — for beginners and advanced surfers.
surf.body: Perfect for first-timers and advanced surfers who want to improve, with a vibrant community and full beach life.

includes.photo: Professional surf photography (in and out of the water)

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Ready to plan your Playa Venao vacation? Talk to us — we'd love to help.
contact.formMessage: Tell us about the trip you're dreaming of
